chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Kim's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience, projects, or availability.

chat.help:
**Available commands:**

*Topics*
`/about` ‚Äî Who is Kim
`/experience` ‚Äî Work history
`/stack` ‚Äî Tech stack
`/skills` ‚Äî Competency breakdown
`/projects` ‚Äî Open-source projects
`/hire` ‚Äî Availability
`/contact` ‚Äî How to reach me
`/cv` ‚Äî Download CV
`/location` ‚Äî Where I'm based
`/databases` ‚Äî Database experience
`/devops` ‚Äî Docker & deployment
`/mentoring` ‚Äî Leadership & mentoring
`/style` ‚Äî How I work
`/certifications` ‚Äî Certificates & courses
`/education` ‚Äî Academic background
`/testimonials` ‚Äî What colleagues say

*Language*
`/en` `/no` `/pt` ‚Äî Switch language

*Other*
`/help` ‚Äî Show this message
`/clear` ‚Äî Clear the screen

Or just ask naturally in any language.
